---
title: "demean"
generated: true
description: "Subtract the (weighted) mean along `axis`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.normalize`](../nitrix-numerics-normalize.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:demean -->
```python
demean(x: Num[Array, '...'], *, axis: _AxisArg = -1, weights: Optional[Num[Array, '...']] = None) -> Num[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:demean -->
Subtract the (weighted) mean along `axis`.

Centres `x` so that its (optionally weighted) mean along
`axis` is zero, leaving the scale unchanged.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:demean -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Num` | `...` | — | Input tensor. |
| `axis` | `_AxisArg` | — | `-1` | Axis (or axes) over which the mean is reduced. Default `-1` (the trailing observation axis). |
| `weights` | `Optional[Num[Array, '...']]` | — | `None` | Optional non-negative weights broadcastable against `x`. When given, a weighted mean is subtracted; when `None`, the unweighted mean is used. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...`. `x` with the (weighted) mean removed along `axis`, same shape as `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:demean -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
